Biggest international for a Broadway adaptation above 2024’s “Wicked” ($50 million)"},{"url":"https://deadline.com/2025/12/wicked-for-good-global-box-office-milestone-1236635920/","title":"‘Wicked: For Good’ Box Office Tops $400 Million Worldwide","content":"Dec 4, 2025 — The first weekend opened to $147M domestic and $223M around the world, besting 2024's Wicked $112.5M domestic and $164M global start. Among ...Read more
EXCLUSIVE: Universal’s Wicked: For Good has crossed the $400M mark globally, now with more than $407M through Wednesday worldwide.
Of that, $278.1M is from domestic and $129M from the international box office.
Wicked: For Good started overseas rollout on November 19 and bowed in North America on November 21.
Among records the Cynthia Erivo-Ariana Grande starrer set in its debut frame are the biggest global and domestic opening for a movie based on a Broadway musical; the biggest opening weekend of 2025 in the UK, where it was Universal’s third-biggest launch ever; and the biggest live-action musical opening ever in Australia.
The Top 10 Wicked: For Good markets to date are UK ($44.5M), Australia ($14.5M), Germany ($6.8M), Korea ($5.7M), Mexico ($5.6M), Philippines ($5M), Netherlands ($3.9M), Spain ($3.6M), France ($3.5M) and Brazil ($3.4M).
China is still to release on December 24, while Japan takes flight on March 6."},{"url":"https://www.forbes.com/sites/zacharyfolk/2025/11/23/wicked-for-good-dominates-box-office-with-150-million-opening-beating-last-years-first-installment/","title":"‘Wicked: For Good’ Grosses $150 Million For Second-Biggest Opening Weekend Of 2025","content":"It was still not enough to unseat “A Minecraft Movie” as the most successful opening weekend of 2025—the adaptation of the massively popular video game grossed over $162 million at the domestic box office when it opened in April, eventually grossing more than $950 million worldwide."}]}

tavily.raw: {"query":"Wicked For Good opening weekend domestic international box office ranking 2025","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://www.the-numbers.com/movie/Wicked-For-Good-(2025)","title":"Wicked: For Good (2025) - Box Office and Financial Information","content":"The Numbers - Where Data and Movies Meet. # Wicked: For Good (2025). | **Domestic Box Office** | $342,915,090 | Details |. | **International Box Office** | $197,145,780 | Details |. | **Worldwide Box Office** | $540,060,870 |  |. | **Domestic Share:** | 63.5% (domestic box office/worldwide) |. ## Box Office Summary Per Territory. | **Bosnia and Herzegovina** | 11/20/2025 | $9,782 | 0 | 0 | 0 | $32,629 | 1/4/2026 |. | **Italy** | 11/20/2025 | $1,470,773 | 0 | 0 | 0 | $2,970,441 | 7/10/2026 |. | **Kenya** | 11/21/2025 | $15,060 | 0 | 0 | 0 | $58,924 | 1/15/2026 |. | **Mongolia** | 11/21/2025 | $12,209 | 0 | 0 | 0 | $21,806 | 12/11/2025 |. | **Nigeria** | 11/21/2025 | $9,659 | 0 | 0 | 0 | $44,076 | 1/18/2026 |. | **Slovenia** | 12/4/2025 | $25,819 | 0 | 0 | 0 | $96,102 | 2/1/2026 |.","score":0.9323611,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.cnn.com/2025/11/23/business/wicked-for-good-box-office-opening","title":"‘Wicked: For Good’ recaptures box office magic with $150 million opening weekend | CNN Business","content":"# ‘Wicked: For Good’ recaptures box office magic with $150 million opening weekend. \"Wicked: For Good,\" the second act to last year's musical adaptation \"Wicked,\" broke records with its $150 million domestic opening. There was no place like the movie theater for fans of “Wicked” this weekend. Universal’s “Wicked: For Good” soared to No. 1 at the weekend box office, earning $150 million domestically and $226 million worldwide — far outpacing its predecessor, “Wicked,” which opened to $114 million domestically during last year’s pre-Thanksgiving weekend. The two films failed to share the same success of “Gladiator II,” which had a domestic opening weekend box office of $55.5 million when it opened alongside “Wicked.”. More of a boost can come on Thanksgiving weekend with Disney’s “Zootopia 2,” which hopes to see similar success from last year’s “Moana 2,” an animated film that grossed over $460 million at the domestic box office.","score":0.92684203,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://variety.com/2025/film/box-office/wicked-for-good-records-opening-weekend-musical-1236590107","title":"'Wicked: For Good' Box Office: All the Records Set on Opening Weekend","content":"# ‘Wicked: For Good’ Box Office: All the Records Set in Opening Weekend. “Wicked: For Good” is flying high at the box office. The movie musical has collected $147 million in North America and $76 million overseas for a dazzling $223 million global tally. Monday’s final tally was slightly behind Sunday’s estimate of $150 million in North America and $226 million globally. It’s also a major win for Universal, which took a bold bet in splitting the popular stage show into two parts, both of which needed to become major blockbusters to justify the expensive gamble. “Wicked” became a four-quadrant hit with $758 million globally, setting the stage for the second film to achieve juggernaut status as well. The second half picks up as Elphaba is branded the Wicked Witch of the West, and Glinda has become a public figure who’s tasked with spreading good. Audiences seem to be “obsessulated” with “Wicked: For Good,” which earned the same “A” grade on CinemaScore exit polls as the first.","score":0.91671574,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://editorial.rottentomatoes.com/article/weekend-box-office-wicked-for-good-soars-to-150-million-opening","title":"Weekend Box Office: Wicked: For Good Soars to $150 Million Opening | Rotten Tomatoes","content":"# Weekend Box Office: *Wicked: For Good* Soars to $150 Million Opening. Set to be the first guaranteed hit of the winter season *For Good*, it is also the beginning of a trifecta of films including *Zootopia 2* and *Avatar: Fire and Ash* that will help put 2025 on a path to have the biggest box office year since the pandemic, defying all the chicken littles out there trying to diminish the future of the theatrical experience. If you followed the tracking on the numbers for ***Wicked: For Good*** this week, it appeared as if each trade and pundit was trying to out-headline the other: $150 million. A solid $150 million domestic gross (compared with $76 million internationally) is the second-highest of the year behind only *A Minecraft Movie’*s $162.8 million, and it’s the fourth-best international launch of the year behind *Jurassic World: Rebirth* ($322.6 million), *Minecraft* ($313.7 million), and *Lilo & Stitch* ($307.2 million), just ahead of *Superman* ($220 million).","score":0.9051298,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.boxofficemojo.com/title/tt19847976","title":"Wicked: For Good (2025)","content":"### Europe, Middle East, and Africa. | United Kingdom | Nov 21, 2025 | $23,293,218 | $63,250,410 |. | Germany | Nov 19, 2025 | $3,345,000 | $11,580,062 |. | Netherlands | Nov 20, 2025 | $1,752,983 | $7,105,579 |. | Spain | Nov 21, 2025 | $2,030,356 | $5,358,859 |. | France | Nov 19, 2025 | $1,866,843 | $5,327,750 |. | Belgium | Nov 19, 2025 | $833,770 | $3,112,705 |. | Italy | Nov 20, 2025 | $1,459,198 | $2,970,202 |. | Sweden | Nov 19, 2025 | $629,741 | $2,280,055 |. | Austria | Nov 19, 2025 | $374,758 | $1,642,271 |. | Switzerland | Nov 19, 2025 | $526,601 | $1,617,800 |. | Finland | Nov 21, 2025 | $293,932 | $1,049,684 |. | Middle East Other | Nov 20, 2025 | $397,629 | $1,023,000 |. | South Africa/Nigeria | Nov 21, 2025 | $246,682 | $991,451 |. | Central America | Nov 20, 2025 | $449,544 | $1,049,519 |.","score":0.8965509,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":0.88,"request_id":"99359318-732b-485b-982a-3b5809bb14ed"}
